---
name: notation-definition-review
description: Use when reviewing an academic document for definition-before-use, notation consistency, acronym discipline, and symbol clarity.
---

# Notation Definition Review

1. Read `agents/skills/notation-definition-review.md`.
1. List symbols, abbreviations, and technical terms before reviewing.
1. Check whether each one is defined before use and used consistently afterward.
1. Treat overloaded notation, missing units/domains/indices, and late assumptions as findings.
